email_1_body:
Hi Andy,

My co-founder and I are building a startup in Singapore to support local businesses and we wanted to reach out because your expertise could save us a ton of mistakes.

Given your experience in logistics, I was hoping to get your opinion.

For some background, we spoke with senior government leaders last week at Smart Nation - they shared that SMEs in underserved areas stand to gain the most from AI compared to MNCs.

We're now looking to figure out which are the biggest pain points logistic firms face and 30 minutes of your time would make a huge difference.

We're a Cambridge led group, based in SG, and have a prototype, but this is in no way a sales call.

If you could just email or WhatsApp an AI assistant your carrier invoices and get back an audit-ready reconciliation in Excel showing overcharges and discrepancies, would that be useful?

Would you be open to a quick chat to point us in the right direction?

Best,
Seth

P.S. Happy to drop by your office at HarbourFront Centre if that's easier!
email_2_body:
Hi Andy,

I did some digging into Highlight International Logistics and had a few ideas on where we could save time:

- Get audit-ready reconciliation of Highlight International Logistics' carrier invoices.
- Extract 99% accurate data from bills of lading for faster processing.
- Flag discrepancies in freight invoices that humans often miss.

Have you solved for carrier invoice reconciliation or is your team still doing it manually?

If we could help you do the same and save 10+ hours a week, automatically from WhatsApp, email or any chat app you already use, would that be interesting?

Best,
Seth
